name: Sour Cream Pie with Raisins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine 2/3 cup sugar, cornstarch, salt and spices. Set aside.
2. Reserve the remaining 1/3 cup of sugar for topping.
3. Beat egg yolks and stir into sour cream.
4. Add to the sugar mixture in the saucepan. Cook over low heat, stirring until thick. Be careful as this can burn easily.
5. Mix in nuts and raisins, then allow to cool.
6. Pour into a baked pie crust shell.
7. Top with meringue made from 1/3 cup sugar and the leftover egg whites.
8. Bake until brown and chill.
Source: Carol Krumheuer
